div.div:
AEM_EDGE_FUNCTIONS_ADC_CONFIG env var:
Parsed transparently in base-command getConfig().
Supplies ADC values to all commands without setup.
Supports same two JSON formats as the file.
Individual env vars always take precedence.
CONFIG_ADC_CONFIGURED set implicitly when present.
